children.name: p
children.textContent: Heavy limbs, brain fog, hard to focus

children.name: p
children.textContent: Back of head, throbbing, light sensitive

children.name: p
children.textContent: Small red patch on left forearm

children.name: p
children.textContent: Headaches spike 3–4 PM on 6 of last 7 days. Strong correlation with caffeine drop (last coffee avg 12:30 PM).

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0891B2" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-zap" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 14a1 1 0 0 1-.78-1.63l9.9-10.2a.5.5 0 0 1 .86.46l-1.92 6.02A1 1 0 0 0 13 10h7a1 1 0 0 1 .78 1.63l-9.9 10.2a.5.5 0 0 1-.86-.46l1.92-6.02A1 1 0 0 0 11 14z"/></svg>

children.name: span
children.textContent: Try shifting last coffee to 1:30 PM

children.name: p
children.textContent: Fatigue severity ↑ 40% on days you take Medication B. Strongest within a 2-hour window after dosage.

children.name: svg
children.svgString: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#0891B2" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-zap" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 14a1 1 0 0 1-.78-1.63l9.9-10.2a.5.5 0 0 1 .86.46l-1.92 6.02A1 1 0 0 0 13 10h7a1 1 0 0 1 .78 1.63l-9.9 10.2a.5.5 0 0 1-.86-.46l1.92-6.02A1 1 0 0 0 11 14z"/></svg>

children.name: span
children.textContent: Discuss dosage timing with your doctor

children.name: p
children.textContent: Days with under 6 hrs sleep show avg 4.2 symptoms vs 1.8 on 7+ hour nights. Clearest pattern this week.
